Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Three doors... I wonder where they lead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Starting from the left and going right, the Shadow readings get stronger. But I'm picking up treasure chests with similar signals, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}So the leftmost one is the least dangerous, but has the smallest reward. And the rightmost one is the riskiest, with the greatest reward...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}It's up to you to decide which way to go, but please keep that information in mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Monad04_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20131 0 0}I'm not detecting anything in the immediate area, so we should be okay for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Monad04_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I suppose I should examine the doors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Monad05_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 1 20136 0 0}Uh, please wait! There are only stairs up ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 8 52 50 0 0}I really think we should figure out what's going on, so please come back for now.[n]{f 1 1}
